create.title: Create Flashcards with AI
create.subtitle: Turn any job posting into personalized Anki-style study flashcards.
create.tokensInfo: You have {{count}} tokens available. Each custom flashcard set costs 2 tokens.
create.cardCountRecommendation: We recommend 10-20 flashcards for a good balance between coverage and study time.
create.invalidLink: Please enter a valid job link from one of the supported sites: LinkedIn, Gupy, Infojobs, Glassdoor, or Indeed.
create.notEnoughTokens: You don't have enough tokens. You need at least 2 tokens to generate flashcards.
create.successGenerated: Flashcards generated successfully! 2 tokens were deducted.
create.errorGenerating: Error generating flashcards. Please try again.

study.question: Question
study.srsExplanation: The Spaced Repetition System schedules reviews based on your performance:
study.sessionComplete: Study session complete! You studied {{cards}} cards in {{time}}min.

myFlashcards.title: My Flashcards
myFlashcards.subtitle: Manage and study the flashcards you created.
myFlashcards.emptyStateDesc: Create your first flashcards from a job posting to start studying intelligently.
myFlashcards.faqSRS: We use the Spaced Repetition (SRS) method. The system automatically calculates the best time for you to review each card, optimizing your memorization with the least effort possible. Study a little every day for best results!
